Description.SourceString: The raven wakes early and perches on the battlements of Dowdun Reach. There it can watch for adventurers. It longs for them to suffer a grisly end, not because a raven feels malice, but because a grisly corpse is easier to feast on. The food has been taken out of its wrapper.
